# Phase 7: HITL Framework - Context

**Gathered:** 2026-04-01
**Status:** Ready for planning
**Source:** Auto-generated by /gsd:drive

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

Implement the run-level autonomy dial and circuit breaker. Three modes: autonomous (no stops, eval-based circuit breaker), supervised (stops at gates), guided (stops after every agent). Circuit breaker: dual token/time budget + eval score plateau detection.

</domain>

<decisions>
## Implementation Decisions

### Claude's Discretion
All decisions deferred to Claude's judgment.

Key context:
- LangGraph supports `interrupt_before` on nodes for HITL pauses
- Run config should be part of GraphState so all nodes can read autonomy level
- Circuit breaker needs: token counter, time tracker, eval score history
- Autonomous mode needs completion criteria: all gates approve OR circuit breaker fires

</decisions>

<specifics>
## Specific Ideas

- RunConfig dataclass: autonomy_level, token_budget, time_budget_seconds, max_gate_retries
- Circuit breaker as a gate wrapper: check budget/eval before allowing retry
- LangGraph `interrupt_before` list computed from autonomy level

</specifics>

<deferred>
## Deferred Ideas

- Per-agent HITL override (v1.2)

</deferred>
